sentences.target: On fait un petit détour par la boulangerie.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fɛ œ̃ pəti detuʁ paʁ la bulɑ̃ʒʁi/

translations.fr: On fait un petit détour par la boulangerie.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fɛ œ̃ pəti detuʁ paʁ la bulɑ̃ʒʁi/
translations.en: We’re making a small detour by the bakery.
translations.es: Hacemos un pequeño desvío para pasar por la panadería.
translations.de: Wir machen einen kleinen Umweg zur Bäckerei.
translations.it: Facciamo una piccola deviazione passando dalla panetteria.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们稍微绕一下去面包店。
translations.yue: 我哋兜個小圈經過麵包舖。
translations.ru: Мы делаем небольшой крюк к пекарне.
translations.pt: Vamos fazer um pequeno desvio para passar na padaria.
translations.he: אנחנו עושים עיקוף קטן דרך המאפייה.
translations.tr: Fırına uğramak için küçük bir sapma yapıyoruz.
translations.vi: Mình đi vòng một chút để ghé tiệm bánh.
translations.nl: We maken een klein omweggetje langs de bakker.
translations.uk: Ми робимо невеликий обхід до пекарні.
translations.hu: Teszünk egy kis kitérőt a pékség felé.
translations.hi: हम बेकरी की तरफ थोड़ा सा चक्कर लगा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κάνουμε μια μικρή παράκαμψη προς τον φούρνο.
translations.nb: Vi tar en liten omvei innom bakeriet.
translations.id: Kita memutar sebentar untuk mampir ke toko roti.
translations.sv: Vi tar en liten omväg förbi bageriet.
translations.ro: Facem un mic ocol pe la brutărie.
translations.da: Vi tager en lille omvej forbi bageren.
translations.ja: パン屋に寄るために少し回り道をします.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal 'on' used (often colloquially) for 'we'; subject of the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); governs the direct object 'un petit détour'.
Indefinite article (masculine singular); determiner of 'détour'.
Adjective; pre-nominal modifier of 'détour' (masculine singular agreement).
Common noun; head of the noun phrase functioning as the direct object of 'fait'.
Preposition; introduces the route complement 'la boulangerie'.
Definite article (feminine singular); determiner of 'boulangerie'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'par'.

sentences.target: Tu peux faire un détour pour éviter l’embouteillage.
sentences.reading: /ty pø fɛʁ œ̃ detuʁ puʁ evite lɑ̃butɛjaʒ/

translations.fr: Tu peux faire un détour pour éviter l’embouteillage.
translations.ipa: /ty pø fɛʁ œ̃ detuʁ puʁ evite lɑ̃butɛjaʒ/
translations.en: You can take a detour to avoid the traffic jam.
translations.es: Puedes hacer un desvío para evitar el atasco.
translations.de: Du kannst einen Umweg fahren, um den Stau zu vermeiden.
translations.it: Puoi fare una deviazione per evitare l’ingorgo.
translations.ru: Ты можешь сделать объезд, чтобы избежать пробки.
translations.pt: Você pode pegar um desvio para evitar o engarrafamento.
translations.he: אתה יכול לעשות עיקוף כדי להימנע מהפקק.
translations.tr: Trafik sıkışıklığından kaçınmak için bir sapma yapabilirsin.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đi đường vòng để tránh kẹt xe.
translations.ar: يمكنك سلوك طريق ملتف لتجنب الازدحام.
translations.nl: Je kunt een omweg nemen om de file te vermijden.
translations.uk: Ти можеш зробити об’їзд, щоб уникнути затору.
translations.hu: Kerülőutat választhatsz, hogy elkerüld a dugót.
translations.hi: तुम ट्रैफिक जाम से बचने के लिए चक्कर लगा सकते हो.
translations.pl: Możesz pojechać objazdem, aby uniknąć korków.
translations.el: Μπορείς να κάνεις μια παράκαμψη για να αποφύγεις το μποτιλιάρισμα.
translations.nb: Du kan ta en omvei for å unngå trafikkork.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengambil jalan memutar untuk menghindari kemacetan.
translations.sv: Du kan ta en omväg för att undvika köerna.
translations.ro: Poți face un ocol ca să eviți ambuteiajul.
translations.cs: Můžeš jet objížďkou, abys se vyhnul koloně.
translations.da: Du kan tage en omvej for at undgå trafikprop.
translations.ja: 渋滞を避けるために迂回してもいいよ.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (2nd person singular); subject of the auxiliary 'peux'.
Modal auxiliary (present indicative, 2nd person singular); expresses ability/permission with infinitive 'faire'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux', heading the action 'faire un détour'.
Indefinite article (masculine singular); determiner of 'détour'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'faire'.
Preposition of purpose; introduces the infinitival clause 'éviter l’embouteillage'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'pour', expressing the purpose of the detour.
Clitic definite article (elision of 'le' before vowel); determiner of 'embouteillage'.
Common noun; direct object of 'éviter'.

sentences.target: Le GPS propose un détour par le parc.
sentences.reading: /lə ʒe pe ɛs pʁɔpoz œ̃ detuʁ paʁ lə paʁk/

translations.fr: Le GPS propose un détour par le parc.
translations.ipa: /lə ʒe pe ɛs pʁɔpoz œ̃ detuʁ paʁ lə paʁk/
translations.en: The GPS suggests a detour through the park.
translations.es: El GPS sugiere un desvío por el parque.
translations.de: Das Navi schlägt einen Umweg durch den Park vor.
translations.it: Il GPS suggerisce una deviazione attraverso il parco.
translations.yue: GPS 建議兜路經過公園。
translations.pt: O GPS sugere um desvio pelo parque.
translations.tr: GPS parkın içinden geçen bir rota öneriyor.
translations.vi: GPS đề xuất đi đường vòng qua công viên.
translations.ar: يقترح نظام GPS التفافًا عبر الحديقة.
translations.nl: De GPS stelt een omweg door het park voor.
translations.hu: A GPS egy kerülőt javasol a parkon át.
translations.hi: GPS पार्क से होकर जाने का एक वैकल्पिक मार्ग सुझा रहा है.
translations.el: Το GPS προτείνει μια παράκαμψη μέσα από το πάρκο.
translations.nb: GPS-en foreslår en omvei gennem parken.
translations.id: GPS menyarankan jalan memutar lewat taman.
translations.sv: GPS:en föreslår en omväg genom parken.
translations.ro: GPS-ul propune un ocol prin parc.
translations.da: GPS'en foreslår en omvej gennem parken.
translations.ja: GPSが公園の中を通る迂回路を提案しています.

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular); determiner of 'GPS'.
Common noun acronym; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); takes 'un détour par le parc' as its complement.
Indefinite article (masculine singular); determiner of 'détour'.
Common noun; direct object of 'propose'.
Preposition; introduces the route complement 'le parc'.
Definite article (masculine singular); determiner of 'parc'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'par'.

sentences.target: Nous faisons un détour avant la station.
sentences.reading: /nu fɛzɔ̃ œ̃ detuʁ avɑ̃ la stasjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous faisons un détour avant la station.
translations.ipa: /nu fɛzɔ̃ œ̃ detuʁ avɑ̃ la stasjɔ̃/
translations.en: We’re taking a detour before the station.
translations.es: Hacemos un desvío antes de la estación.
translations.de: Wir machen einen Umweg vor dem Bahnhof.
translations.it: Facciamo una deviazione prima della stazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们到车站之前先绕一下路。
translations.yue: 我哋到車站之前先兜路。
translations.pt: Vamos fazer um desvio antes da estação.
translations.tr: İstasyona varmadan önce bir sapma yapıyoruz.
translations.vi: Bọn mình đi đường vòng trước khi tới nhà ga.
translations.nl: We maken een omweg voor het station.
translations.hu: A pályaudvar előtt teszünk egy kitérőt.
translations.hi: हम स्टेशन पहुँचने से पहले थोड़ा सा चक्कर लगाते हैं.
translations.el: Κάνουμε μια παράκαμψη πριν από τον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Vi tar en omvei før stasjonen.
translations.id: Kami mengambil jalan memutar sebelum stasiun.
translations.sv: Vi tar en omväg innan stationen.
translations.ro: Facem un ocol înainte de gară.
translations.da: Vi tager en omvej før stationen.
translations.ja: 駅に着く前に迂回します.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person plural); subject of 'faisons'.

Definite article (feminine singular); determiner of 'station'.
